items.radar_reason: AI职业替代趋势影响服务场景设计

items.title: SpaceX Shares Rise, Set to Extend Gains After Record IPO
items.description: SpaceX shares jumped in premarket trading Monday, after its blockbuster debut Friday vaulted it into the ranks of the world’s most valuable public companies.

items.title: Top Banks Rush to Fill Chief AI Roles as Talent Jumps to Rivals
